docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $11,300.00 FILED BY MORITZ, ALEXANDER KUJAWA, MARTA AS TO DEFENDANT ZANDIAN, RAHMATTOLAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RESET HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORITZ, ALEXANDER KUJAWA, MARTA
TRIAL RESET TO APR-03-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-08-2025 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORITZ, ALEXANDER KUJAWA, MARTA AS TO DEFENDANT ZANDIAN, RAHMATTOLAH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-08-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZANDIAN, RAHMATTOLAH
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY ZANDIAN, RAHMATTOLAH AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MORITZ, ALEXANDER KUJAWA, MARTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORITZ, ALEXANDER KUJAWA, MARTA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-03-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-03-2025 VISITING JUDGE JOHN FEENEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER MORITZ AND MARTA KUJAWA ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAHMATTOLAH ZANDIAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-03-2025 VISITING JUDGE JOHN FEENEY. APPEARANCES: CROSS-COMPLAINANT RAHMATTOLAH ZANDIAN IS PRESENT. CROSS-DEFENDANTS ALEXANDER MORITZ AND MARTA KUJAWA ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORITZ, ALEXANDER KUJAWA, MARTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZANDIAN, RAHMATTOLAH $11,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,375.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ZANDIAN, RAHMATTOLAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MORITZ, ALEXANDER KUJAWA, MARTA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REMARK:EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
